title: uiinpui's QoL Enchantments (legacy version)
description: A version of uiinpui's Enchantments (legacy version) that only has the Quality of Life Enchantments.
body:
This datapack is a version of an older datapack of mine called [uiinpui's Enchantments](https://modrinth.com/datapack/uiinpuis-enchantments). There is one difference however: This datapack only has the enchantments that I deem Quality of Life. These are enchantments that don't make a big difference for things like combat or exploration, but more focus on small little things that are nice to have, without granting a big buff that heavily impacts the game. That is why enchantments like Desert Runner and Snow Speed, that affect movement speed are absent in this version of the datapack. 

The pack contains the following enchantments from [uiinpui's Enchantments](https://modrinth.com/datapack/uiinpuis-enchantments): Big Hands, Voiding, Shellsplosion, Blazing and Root. There are two new structures in this datapack as well: the Rooted Logs and the Voided Island The descriptions for the Enchantments are in the spoiler below:

<details>
<summary>Enchantment Descriptions</summary>
  
- Big Hands: Gain +0.5 extra reach per level on blocks for easier building. Has 5 levels and works on chestplates.
- Root: Mend 1 durability on armor pieces per second per level when standing on dirt-like blocks, found in the rooted logs structure.
- Blazing: An enchantment for netherite pickaxes (yes, only netherite) that makes (deepslate) iron/gold ore and ancient debris drop their smelted form. Works with fortune, but is incompatible with silk touch. It's found in fortress chests.
- Shellsplosion: Allows shulkers to drop from 0-2 shells, while still being able to get the bonus looting chance, goes on swords just like looting. It's found in end city loot.
- Voiding: Commonly found underground blocks will be "voided" when mined with a pickaxe enchanted with this enchantment. Found on top of the voided island.
<details>
<summary>Voiding Block List</summary>

- Andesite
- Diorite
- Granite
- Stone
- Tuff
- Deepslate
- Netherrack
- Blackstone
- Basalt

Side note: I intentionally didn't include End Stone because this enchantment is more for convenience when mining and you don't really need to mine in the end.

Side note 2: This enchantment is designed to be on a backup pickaxe, not on your main pickaxe. That's why blocks like basalt and blackstone are also there. It's mainly designed to carve out large areas or to not pick up common blocks during mining.
</details>
</details>

If you want another QoL enchantment, [Solar Soar](https://modrinth.com/datapack/solar-soar) is a standalone datapack that adds another new enchantment! I might add it to this datapack later on as well.
